subject: Can't generate tilt stack for IMOD
body:
Hi all,

I’ve just started processing a tomography dataset for a collaborator and 
I’m having some issues generating the tilt stack for imod.

After doing the 2D processing on Warp, I move to the tomography section by 
selecting .tomostar. When I click on “Import tilt series from IMOD”, and 
select the folder where to find the raw data and the mdoc, I get the 
following error:

“String was not recognised as a valid DateTime”

And none of the stacks get listed.

The dataset has been collected at eBIC with SerialEM, and the mdoc have 
also been generated during data collection. I am currently using Warp 1.0.9.

At first, I thought it could have been a problem related to the mdoc files, 
so I tried generating them myself using mdocspoofer from Alister Burt 
(https://github.com/alisterburt/mdocspoofer) but I got the following error:

(mdocs) support-X299X-DESIGNARE-10G:/DATA/gb629/test_Position_10$ 
mdocspoofer
Directory containing frames: /DATA/gb629/test_Position_10
Dose per image (electrons per square angstrom): 2.94
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/gp468/eman2-sphire-sparx/envs/mdocs/bin/mdocspoofer", line 
33, in <module>
    sys.exit(load_entry_point('mdocspoofer', 'console_scripts', 
'mdocspoofer')())
  File 
"/home/gp468/eman2-sphire-sparx/envs/mdocs/lib/python3.9/site-packages/click/core.py", 
line 1130, in _call_
    return self.main(*args, **kwargs)
  File 
"/home/gp468/eman2-sphire-sparx/envs/mdocs/lib/python3.9/site-packages/click/core.py", 
line 1055, in main   rv = self.invoke(ctx)
File 
"/home/gp468/eman2-sphire-sparx/envs/mdocs/lib/python3.9/site-packages/click/core.py", 
line 1404, in invoke
  return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params)
  File 
"/home/gp468/eman2-sphire-sparx/envs/mdocs/lib/python3.9/site-packages/click/core.py", 
line 760, in invoke
   return __callback(*args, **kwargs)
File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 178, in cli
  f = FramesDir(directory, dose_per_image)
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 12, in _init_
    self.write()
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 40, in write
    for mdoc in self.mdocs:
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 33, in mdocs
    for basename in self.unique_basenames:
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 24, in unique_basenames
    basenames = [mdoc_image.basename for mdoc_image in self.mdoc_images]
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 24, in <listcomp>
    basenames = [mdoc_image.basename for mdoc_image in self.mdoc_images]
  File "/DATA/gb629/20221122_Karlo_ebic/mdocspoofer/mdocspoofer/mdoc.py", 
line 128, in basename
    return self.regex.group(1)
AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'group'

Did anyone encounter the same error/errors? Any help or advice would be 
very appreciated!

Thank you in advance,

Best
Giulia
